models.name: Black Model (Black-76)
models.short_description: Adapts Black-Scholes to price options on forwards and futures — the market standard for quoting interest rate option volatilities.
models.key_insight: The model provides a common volatility language for the market.

models.name: SABR Model
models.short_description: A stochastic volatility model capturing the smile/skew through correlated forward rate and volatility dynamics.
models.formula: dF = σ̂F^β dW1, dσ̂ = νσ̂ dW2
models.key_insight: Four parameters (α,β,ρ,ν) capture the entire vol surface dynamics.
